title: RLQ Pain - Acute Appendicitis
chief_complaint: Abdominal pain that started around umbilicus 12 hours ago, now shifted to right lower quadrant. Nausea, anorexia.

physical_exam.abdomen: Tenderness at McBurney point, rebound tenderness, Rovsing sign positive

hidden_data.us_abd: Non-compressible tubular structure in RLQ, 8mm diameter with surrounding fluid

patient_responses.pain_start: It started around my belly button last night
patient_responses.appetite: I don't want to eat, I feel sick

hints.exam_hint: Check McBurney point and Rovsing sign
hints.imaging: Ultrasound is first-line in young patients

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Acute appendicitis with classic migration of pain.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is acute appendicitis. The migration of pain from umbilicus to RLQ is classic.
feedback.attending_note: Classic appendicitis presentation. Early surgical consultation is key. Laparoscopic appendectomy within 24 hours is standard.
